map: VIDEO-RECOVERED: Norse grassland/forest biome — green grass, pine/conifer trees, winding dirt paths, a river/water body along the east edge — that you traverse toward the boss. Boss fight is in a separate CIRCULAR DARK ARENA: a round platform of near-black ground surrounded by void, with structures at the rim. (from youtube -N3MH_woifQ, closed-testing footage)
